name: postgres-introspection
description: Teaches an AI agent to build a read-only database introspection capability inside the repository it is working in, rendering live database state into committed, navigable files. Database-agnostic method with a PostgreSQL reference implementation.

interface.shortDescription: Build read-only database introspection into the repository you are working in.
interface.longDescription: Teaches an AI agent the introspection method and how to recreate the tooling inside its own repository: a read-only tool that reads a live database's catalogs and renders the structure, security, and exposed surface into committed, navigable files. Database-agnostic with a PostgreSQL reference implementation, extends to layers such as the cluster, a connection pooler, and a REST layer.
defaultPrompt: Set up database introspection in this repository.
